title: codereview: add test for AnnounceError::InvalidChannel
description: After adding the InvalidChannel variant to AnnounceError and validation logic in from_bytes(), a unit test should be added to verify rejection of current_channel values >7 (per CCP-9 0-7 range). This ensures the new error path is exercised. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-w8sy
close_reason: Added test case for header channel validation (>15 at data[5]) + fixed missing arg in AnnounceError::InvalidChannel(rx_channel) in from_bytes(). Existing test for rx_channel >=8 and builder already present. Covers CCP-9 0-7 range rejection. Commit e38051ee1.
